title: NeoRtp
description: Teleport players safely to random locations with a modern GUI and full configuration options
body:
[ ![erly acces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2334cf3eb4b13ee2695bae533f8044f6237efd83.png)](https://discord.gg/uuZ6VPVMvP)
# NeoRtp тАУ Random Teleport Plugin

**NeoRtp** is a lightweight, safe, and customizable **Random Teleport (RTP)** plugin.  
It allows players to quickly teleport to random locations in the **Overworld**, **Nether**, or **End** using either a **GUI menu** or direct commands.

---

## тЬи Features
- **Command `/rtp`**
  - No arguments тЖТ Opens an interactive **GUI** (choose Overworld, Nether, or End).
  - With arguments тЖТ Teleports directly to a chosen world (`/rtp overworld`, `/rtp nether`, `/rtp end`).
- **Safe teleportation system**
  - Avoids lava, water, powder snow, cactus, fire, magma, etc.
  - Ensures at least 2 blocks of air above the player.
  - Respects the **WorldBorder**.
- **Configurable cooldown** (default: 60 seconds).
- **Visual & sound effects** (Enderman teleport sound + portal particles).
- **Customizable messages** (`messages.yml`).
- **Flexible configuration** (`config.yml`):
  - Minimum and maximum teleport radius per world.
  - Custom teleport center (or spawn by default).
- **Permissions support** for staff & players.

---

## ЁЯФз Configuration
- `config.yml` тЖТ cooldown, min/max radius, custom center.
- `messages.yml` тЖТ translate or personalize all plugin messages.

---

## ЁЯУж Permissions
- `neortp.use` тЖТ allows using `/rtp` (enabled by default).
- `neortp.bypass.cooldown` тЖТ bypasses the cooldown (for staff).

---

## ЁЯЫая╕П Requirements
- **Paper 1.21.x** (works from `1.21.0` to `1.21.8`).
- **Java 21** or higher.

---

## ЁЯФо Future Plans
- Economy support (Vault) тЖТ pay for teleportation.
- PlaceholderAPI integration.
- World/biome restrictions.

---
